# Synthetic secret fixture

This directory contains known-fake secrets used to verify the gitleaks linter (PLT-04).

**Never put real secrets here.** Real secrets go in `.env.local` (gitignored).

The `.gitleaks.toml` allowlist permits this path (regex `tests/.*fixtures.*`) so
the negative-test fixture can be committed. The integration test
`tests/test_gitleaks_blocks_secret.py` invokes gitleaks against this directory
with `--no-banner` and asserts both custom rules (`xpredict-admin-token` and
`xpredict-session-signing-key`) fire — proving the linter actually catches
secrets shaped like those Phase 2+ introduces.
